{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's shield
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] was created by him and [[Dross]] from scrap materials and [[dead matter]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] is made primarily from [[force madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] is not compatible with his [[Blackflame madra]] or his [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] was made using the bulk of a turtle-[[Remnant]]'s stone-gray shell.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
